name: Omi - The Dream Parasite
description:
[ANY POV]

You fell asleep, anticipating another session of sweet dreams. However, the dream was strange, really strange. Everything seemed too realistic as if you weren't asleep at all. You were in some sort of a white space, some kind of void. And as you thought that you were alone, someone called out for you. It was Omi who decided to finally reveal himself to you.

Idk why, but each time I look at his face, it reminds me of that furry version of Discord.

Artist - jaybeyyy
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
